master_style: Warm, colorful illustration for a children's classroom spelling book. Educational setting, bright cheerful palette. Clean art style for elementary school students. Dominican/Caribbean children.
page_prompts: A cheerful Dominican girl sitting at a school desk, smiling at a large colorful chalkboard that shows the rule 'I before E except after C' in big bright chalk letters. Open spelling books and colorful word cards are spread on her desk. Warm classroom with sunlight through windows, plants on the windowsill. Inviting, encouraging atmosphere.
